rows.label: tev002101_MSG0001
rows.name:
I don't get it. Nelson's team was
full of talented BLADEs, and they
were even outfitted with a Doll![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Make sure you're well-prepared before
you go. Your destination is in the
eastern part of Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0003
rows.name:
I think Lao's team is installing a data
probe near the land bridge that connects
Primordial Wilderness to Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0004
rows.name:
I know Lao's not the most pleasant
guy to be around, but he's a hell
of a shot with a sniper rifle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0005
rows.name:
You probably want to stop
by and introduce yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0006
rows.name:
From the intel we've received, it
sounds like the Growth regiment over
there is more like a battalion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0007
rows.name:
But I know you guys will figure out
a way to get Iriina's team out of
there. We're counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0008
rows.name:
By the way, Lao's team, who we sent
on ahead of you, haven't been making
their scheduled check-ins.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0009
rows.name:
When you join up with Lao, tell him I said to
stop blowing off his damn status reports already.
And also tell him that it's a damn order![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Our Blue Bloods have almost hit their limits.
If you can't get that data back from Lao, it's
see-ya-in-hell time for the whole human race.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0020
rows.name:
I need you to chase after Lao,
give him what he's got coming,
and get that data back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Cutting out the brain has taken a
lot of the fight out of the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0022
rows.name:
But there are still plenty of Growth loyalists
out there who are more desperate than ever. Not
to mention the freakin' swarms of indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0023
rows.name:
BLADE has a lot more work to do before
we can call this mission accomplished.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002101_MSG0024
rows.name:
If you want to start taking it a little easier,
that's fine. But don't you go telling yourself this
is over. Because it ain't. Not by a long shot.[ST:wait ]
